message:
fix(tests): thread-local HTTP/1 listener test clock and gen_server origin format update

HTTP/1 listener tests now use a thread_local Cell<u64> instead of a
global AtomicU64 for the injected test clock. This eliminates potential
cross-test interference when tests run in parallel on the same thread
pool, since each test thread gets its own clock state.

gen_server test assertion updated to match the new Node(...) wrapper
format for remote_origin, reflecting an upstream change to how origin
identifiers are serialized in child context inheritance.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
